Clotho — Personal work and time management through reflection,
transcripts, and sense-making.

clotho-core/src/domain/entities/capture..doc_comment:
Container entity for a meeting occurrence.

Has associated Transcript and/or Notes. Carries date, attendees, and
related entity references.

clotho-core/src/domain/entities/capture..name: Transcript
clotho-core/src/domain/entities/capture..signature: { id: EntityId, title: String, created_at: DateTime<Utc>, updated_at: DateTime<Utc>, tags: Vec<Tag>, content: String, me...
clotho-core/src/domain/entities/capture..doc_comment:
Raw meeting content, typically from a transcription service.

Source for AI extraction. Belongs to exactly one Meeting.

clotho-core/src/domain/entities/capture..name: Note
clotho-core/src/domain/entities/capture..signature: { id: EntityId, title: String, created_at: DateTime<Utc>, updated_at: DateTime<Utc>, tags: Vec<Tag>, content: String, me...
clotho-core/src/domain/entities/capture..doc_comment:
Authored content, freeform.

Can belong to a Meeting or stand alone.

clotho-core/src/domain/entities/capture..name: Reflection
clotho-core/src/domain/entities/capture..signature: { id: EntityId, title: String, created_at: DateTime<Utc>, updated_at: DateTime<Utc>, tags: Vec<Tag>, content: String, pe...
clotho-core/src/domain/entities/capture..doc_comment:
Time-period bound thinking.

Period types: daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly, adhoc.
May relate to Programs for scoped reflection.

clotho-core/src/domain/entities/capture..signature:
(
        title: impl Into<String>,
        period_type: PeriodType,
        period_start: DateTime<Utc>,
        period_end: DateTime<Utc>,
    ) -> Self

clotho-core/src/domain/entities/capture..doc_comment:
Deliverable with external source link.

Examples: design docs, PRs, presentations, shipped features.
Ingested as markdown with link to original.

clotho-core/src/domain/entities/derived..signature: { id: EntityId, title: String, created_at: DateTime<Utc>, updated_at: DateTime<Utc>, extraction_status: ExtractionStatus...

clotho-core/src/domain/entities/derived..signature: (title: impl Into<String>, confidence: f32, source_span: Option<SourceSpan>) -> Self

clotho-core/src/domain/entities/executio.signature: { id: EntityId, title: String, created_at: DateTime<Utc>, updated_at: DateTime<Utc>, status: Status, tags: Vec<Tag>, con...
clotho-core/src/domain/entities/executio.doc_comment: Long-running work thread. May relate to Programs or Responsibilities.

clotho-core/src/domain/entities/executio.name: Task
clotho-core/src/domain/entities/executio.signature: { id: EntityId, title: String, created_at: DateTime<Utc>, updated_at: DateTime<Utc>, state: TaskState, tags: Vec<Tag>, c...
clotho-core/src/domain/entities/executio.doc_comment:
Discrete work item with a state machine lifecycle.

Valid transitions:
- Todo → Doing
- Doing → Blocked, Done
- Blocked → Doing
- Done is terminal

clotho-core/src/domain/entities/person.r.name: Person
clotho-core/src/domain/entities/person.r.signature: { id: EntityId, name: String, email: Option<String>, created_at: DateTime<Utc>, updated_at: DateTime<Utc>, tags: Vec<Tag...
clotho-core/src/domain/entities/person.r.doc_comment:
Lightweight rolodex entry for people.

Used for entity resolution during AI extraction (fuzzy matching on name/email).
Notes are stored as markdown content.

clotho-core/src/domain/entities/structur.name: Program
clotho-core/src/domain/entities/structur.signature: { id: EntityId, title: String, created_at: DateTime<Utc>, updated_at: DateTime<Utc>, status: Status, tags: Vec<Tag>, con...
clotho-core/src/domain/entities/structur.doc_comment:
Strategic initiative with explicit objectives.

Examples: technical education, PMO establishment, monolith breakup.

clotho-core/src/domain/entities/structur.name: Responsibility
clotho-core/src/domain/entities/structur.signature: { id: EntityId, title: String, created_at: DateTime<Utc>, updated_at: DateTime<Utc>, status: Status, tags: Vec<Tag>, con...
clotho-core/src/domain/entities/structur.doc_comment:
Ongoing role obligation that never "completes".

Examples: team mentorship, HR reporting, budget management, 1:1s.

clotho-core/src/domain/entities/structur.name: Objective
clotho-core/src/domain/entities/structur.signature: { id: EntityId, title: String, created_at: DateTime<Utc>, updated_at: DateTime<Utc>, status: Status, tags: Vec<Tag>, con...
clotho-core/src/domain/entities/structur.doc_comment:
Outcome within a Program.

Belongs to exactly one Program.

live in clotho-extract/backends/.
These are trait definitions only — concrete implementations (Claude, Ollama, etc.)
Per CLO-A-0001 (trait-based LLM backend abstraction) and CLO-A-0003 (VSS).

LLM backend trait definitions and request/response types.

clotho-core/src/domain/llm_types.rs.name: Extractor
clotho-core/src/domain/llm_types.rs.doc_comment: Core trait for LLM-powered extraction from transcripts.

clotho-core/src/domain/llm_types.rs.signature: { content: String, context: Option<String>, max_length: Option<usize> }

live in clotho-extract/backends/.
These are trait definitions only — concrete implementations (Claude, Ollama, etc.)
Per CLO-A-0001 (trait-based LLM backend abstraction) and CLO-A-0003 (VSS).

live in clotho-extract/backends/.
These are trait definitions only — concrete implementations (Claude, Ollama, etc.)
Per CLO-A-0001 (trait-based LLM backend abstraction) and CLO-A-0003 (VSS).

LLM backend trait definitions and request/response types.

clotho-core/src/domain/llm_types.rs.name: Resolver
clotho-core/src/domain/llm_types.rs.doc_comment: Core trait for LLM-assisted entity resolution.

live in clotho-extract/backends/.

Per CLO-A-0001 (trait-based LLM backend abstraction) and CLO-A-0003 (VSS).

clotho-core/src/domain/llm_types.rs.name: Embedder
clotho-core/src/domain/llm_types.rs.doc_comment:
Core trait for generating vector embeddings from text.

Per CLO-A-0003: embeddings are stored in SQLite+VSS (index/vectors.db)
as a derived index for semantic similarity search.

clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.name: Relation
clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.signature: { source_id: EntityId, target_id: EntityId, relation_type: RelationType }
clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.doc_comment: A typed relation between two entities (domain-level view of a graph edge).

clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.name: RelationType
clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.signature: BelongsTo | RelatesTo | Delivers | SpawnedFrom | ExtractedFrom | HasDecision | HasRisk | BlockedBy | Mentions | HasCaden...

clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.name: Entity
clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.signature: { fn id(), fn entity_type(), fn title(), fn created_at(), fn updated_at() }

clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.name: Taskable
clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.signature: { fn state(), fn transition(), fn valid_transitions() }
clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.doc_comment:
Entities with task-like workflow state machine.

Valid transitions:
- Todo → Doing
- Doing → Blocked, Done
- Blocked → Doing
- Done is terminal

clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.signature: { fn extraction_status(), fn source_span(), fn confidence(), fn promote(), fn discard() }
clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.doc_comment:
Entities produced by AI extraction with a draft lifecycle.

Lifecycle: Draft → Promoted | Discarded (both terminal).

clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.name: Relatable
clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.doc_comment: Entities that participate in the relation graph.

clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.name: Taggable
clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.signature: { fn tags(), fn add_tag(), fn remove_tag() }

clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.name: ContentBearing
clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.signature: { fn content(), fn set_content(), fn content_path() }
clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.doc_comment: Entities with markdown content stored as files.

clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.name: HasCadence
clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.doc_comment: Entities with a recurring schedule (e.g., "weekly sync every Monday").

clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.name: HasDeadline
clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.doc_comment: Entities with a hard due date.

clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.name: HasSchedule
clotho-core/src/domain/traits.rs.doc_comment: Entities scheduled at a specific date/time.

clotho-core/src/domain/types.rs.name: EntityType
clotho-core/src/domain/types.rs.signature: Program | Responsibility | Objective | Workstream | Task | Meeting | Transcript | Note | Reflection | Artifact | Decisio...

clotho-core/src/domain/types.rs.name: SourceSpan
clotho-core/src/domain/types.rs.signature: { transcript_id: EntityId, start: usize, end: usize }
clotho-core/src/domain/types.rs.doc_comment: Reference to a span within a transcript.

clotho-core/src/domain/types.rs.name: Frequency
clotho-core/src/domain/types.rs.signature: Daily | Weekly | Biweekly | Monthly | Quarterly | Yearly | Custom

clotho-core/src/domain/types.rs.name: Cadence
clotho-core/src/domain/types.rs.signature: { frequency: Frequency, cron: Option<String>, label: Option<String>, next_occurrence: Option<DateTime<Utc>> }
clotho-core/src/domain/types.rs.doc_comment:
Recurring schedule metadata.

Stored on entity structs via the `HasCadence` trait AND materialized
as `HAS_CADENCE` graph edges for cross-entity temporal queries.

clotho-core/src/error.rs.name: TransitionError
clotho-core/src/error.rs.doc_comment: Error when an invalid task state transition is attempted.

clotho-core/src/error.rs.name: PromotionError
clotho-core/src/error.rs.doc_comment: Error when promoting a non-draft extraction.

clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.name: EdgeInfo
clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.signature: { source_id: EntityId, target_id: EntityId, relation_type: RelationType }
clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.doc_comment: Metadata about an edge in the graph.

clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.name: add_edge
clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.signature:
(
        &self,
        source: &EntityId,
        target: &EntityId,
        rel_type: RelationType,
    ) -> Result<(), GraphError>
clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.doc_comment:
Add a typed relation between two nodes.

Upserts — if the edge already exists, it's a no-op.

clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.name: add_edge_with_props
clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.signature:
(
        &self,
        source: &EntityId,
        target: &EntityId,
        rel_type: RelationType,
        props: Vec<(String, String)>,
    ) -> Result<(), GraphError>
clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.doc_comment: Add a typed relation with properties (for temporal edges, etc.).

clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.name: remove_edge
clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.signature:
(
        &self,
        source: &EntityId,
        target: &EntityId,
        rel_type: RelationType,
    ) -> Result<(), GraphError>
clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.doc_comment: Remove a typed relation between two nodes.

clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.name: has_edge
clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.signature:
(
        &self,
        source: &EntityId,
        target: &EntityId,
        rel_type: RelationType,
    ) -> Result<bool, GraphError>
clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.doc_comment: Check whether a typed relation exists between two nodes.

clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.name: get_edges_from
clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.doc_comment: Get all outgoing edges from a node.

clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.name: get_edges_by_type
clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.doc_comment: Get outgoing edges of a specific type from a node.

clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.name: get_edges_to
clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.doc_comment: Get all incoming edges to a node.

clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.name: query_edges
clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.doc_comment: Internal helper to execute an edge query and parse results.

clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.name: rel_type_to_string
clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.doc_comment: Convert RelationType to the string used as graphqlite relationship type.

clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.name: parse_relation_type
clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.doc_comment: Parse a RelationType from its string representation.

clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.name: parse_entity_id
clotho-core/src/graph/edges.rs.doc_comment: Parse an EntityId from a UUID string.

clotho-core/src/graph/mod.rs.name: GraphStore
clotho-core/src/graph/mod.rs.doc_comment:
The core graph store wrapping graphqlite.

Provides typed CRUD operations for entity nodes and relation edges.
File-backed for production use, in-memory for tests.

clotho-core/src/graph/mod.rs.name: in_memory
clotho-core/src/graph/mod.rs.doc_comment: Create an in-memory graph database (for tests).

clotho-core/src/graph/mod.rs.name: graph
clotho-core/src/graph/mod.rs.doc_comment: Access the underlying graphqlite Graph for advanced operations.

clotho-core/src/graph/nodes.rs.name: NodeInfo
clotho-core/src/graph/nodes.rs.signature: { id: EntityId, entity_type: EntityType, title: String }
clotho-core/src/graph/nodes.rs.doc_comment: Metadata about a node in the graph.

clotho-core/src/graph/nodes.rs.name: register_node
clotho-core/src/graph/nodes.rs.signature:
(
        &self,
        id: &EntityId,
        entity_type: EntityType,
        title: &str,
    ) -> Result<(), GraphError>
clotho-core/src/graph/nodes.rs.doc_comment:
Register an entity as a node in the graph.

Upserts — if the node already exists, its properties are updated.

clotho-core/src/graph/nodes.rs.name: remove_node
clotho-core/src/graph/nodes.rs.doc_comment: Remove a node and all its edges from the graph.

clotho-core/src/graph/nodes.rs.name: get_node
clotho-core/src/graph/nodes.rs.doc_comment: Get metadata about a node by querying with Cypher.

clotho-core/src/graph/nodes.rs.name: has_node
clotho-core/src/graph/nodes.rs.doc_comment: Check whether a node exists in the graph.

clotho-core/src/graph/nodes.rs.name: parse_entity_type
clotho-core/src/graph/nodes.rs.doc_comment: Parse an EntityType from its Display string.

clotho-core/src/graph/queries.rs.name: get_neighbors
clotho-core/src/graph/queries.rs.doc_comment: Get all nodes connected to a given node (regardless of direction or type).

clotho-core/src/graph/queries.rs.name: get_related_by_type
clotho-core/src/graph/queries.rs.doc_comment: Get nodes reached by outgoing edges of a specific type.

clotho-core/src/graph/queries.rs.name: get_incoming_by_type
clotho-core/src/graph/queries.rs.doc_comment: Get nodes with incoming edges of a specific type pointing to this node.

clotho-core/src/graph/queries.rs.name: get_entities_by_label
clotho-core/src/graph/queries.rs.doc_comment: Get all nodes of a specific entity type.

clotho-core/src/graph/queries.rs.name: raw_cypher
clotho-core/src/graph/queries.rs.doc_comment: Execute a raw Cypher query. Escape hatch for custom queries from CLI/MCP.

clotho-core/src/graph/queries.rs.name: query_nodes
clotho-core/src/graph/queries.rs.doc_comment: Internal helper to execute a node query and parse results.

clotho-mcp/src/formatting.rs.name: text_result
clotho-mcp/src/formatting.rs.doc_comment: Helper to build a CallToolResult from text content.

clotho-mcp/src/formatting.rs.name: error_result
clotho-mcp/src/formatting.rs.doc_comment: Helper to build an error CallToolResult.

clotho-mcp/src/lib.rs.name: run
clotho-mcp/src/lib.rs.doc_comment: Run the Clotho MCP server on stdio transport.

clotho-mcp/src/tools/all_tools.rs.name: ClothoTools
clotho-mcp/src/tools/all_tools.rs.doc_comment: Registry of all Clotho MCP tools.

clotho-mcp/src/tools/create_note.rs.signature: { workspace_path: String, title: String, content: String }

clotho-mcp/src/tools/create_reflection.r.signature: { workspace_path: String, period: String, title: Option<String>, program_id: Option<String> }

clotho-mcp/src/tools/create_relation.rs.name: CreateRelationTool
clotho-mcp/src/tools/create_relation.rs.signature: { workspace_path: String, source_id: String, relation_type: String, target_id: String }

clotho-mcp/src/tools/delete_relation.rs.name: DeleteRelationTool
clotho-mcp/src/tools/delete_relation.rs.signature: { workspace_path: String, source_id: String, relation_type: String, target_id: String }

clotho-mcp/src/tools/ingest.rs.name: IngestTool
clotho-mcp/src/tools/ingest.rs.signature: { workspace_path: String, file_path: String, entity_type: Option<String>, title: Option<String> }

clotho-mcp/src/tools/list_entities.rs.name: ListEntitiesTool
clotho-mcp/src/tools/list_entities.rs.signature: { workspace_path: String, entity_type: Option<String>, status: Option<String>, state: Option<String> }

clotho-mcp/src/tools/search.rs.name: SearchTool
clotho-mcp/src/tools/search.rs.signature: { workspace_path: String, query: String, limit: Option<u32> }

clotho-mcp/src/tools/sync.rs.name: SyncTool
clotho-mcp/src/tools/sync.rs.signature: { workspace_path: String, prune: Option<bool>, keep: Option<u32> }

clotho-mcp/src/tools/update_entity.rs.name: UpdateEntityTool
clotho-mcp/src/tools/update_entity.rs.signature: { workspace_path: String, entity_id: String, title: Option<String>, status: Option<String>, state: Option<String> }

clotho-store/src/content.rs.name: new
clotho-store/src/content.rs.doc_comment: Create a new ContentStore rooted at the workspace content directory.

clotho-store/src/content.rs.name: content_path
clotho-store/src/content.rs.doc_comment: Resolve the filesystem path for an entity's content file (no I/O).

clotho-store/src/content.rs.name: write_content
clotho-store/src/content.rs.signature:
(
        &self,
        entity_type: EntityType,
        id: &EntityId,
        content: &str,
    ) -> Result<PathBuf, StoreError>
clotho-store/src/content.rs.doc_comment:
Write markdown content for an entity.

Creates the file (and parent directories if needed). Returns the path written to.

clotho-store/src/content.rs.name: read_content
clotho-store/src/content.rs.doc_comment:
Read markdown content for an entity.

Returns `None` if the file doesn't exist.

clotho-store/src/content.rs.name: delete_content
clotho-store/src/content.rs.doc_comment: Delete the content file for an entity.

clotho-store/src/content.rs.name: list_content
clotho-store/src/content.rs.doc_comment: List all content files in a subdirectory for a given entity type.

clotho-store/src/content.rs.name: entity_type_to_subdir
clotho-store/src/content.rs.doc_comment: Map an EntityType to its content subdirectory name.

clotho-store/src/data/entities.rs.name: EntityRow
clotho-store/src/data/entities.rs.signature: { id: String, entity_type: String, title: String, created_at: String, updated_at: String, status: Option<String>, task_s...
clotho-store/src/data/entities.rs.doc_comment:
A flat row representing an entity in SQLite.

This is the serializable bridge between domain entity types and the database.
Conversion to/from domain entities happens at a higher layer (sync).

clotho-store/src/data/entities.rs.name: open
clotho-store/src/data/entities.rs.doc_comment: Open or create the entity store at the given path.

clotho-store/src/data/entities.rs.name: in_memory
clotho-store/src/data/entities.rs.doc_comment: Open an in-memory entity store (for tests).

clotho-store/src/data/entities.rs.name: connection
clotho-store/src/data/entities.rs.doc_comment: Access the underlying connection (for federation ATTACH).

clotho-store/src/data/extractions.rs.name: ExtractionRow
clotho-store/src/data/extractions.rs.signature: { id: String, entity_type: String, title: String, speech_act: Option<String>, extraction_status: String, source_transcri...
clotho-store/src/data/extractions.rs.doc_comment: A flat row representing a draft extraction in SQLite.

clotho-store/src/data/extractions.rs.name: open
clotho-store/src/data/extractions.rs.doc_comment: Open or create the extraction store at the given path.

clotho-store/src/data/extractions.rs.name: in_memory
clotho-store/src/data/extractions.rs.doc_comment: Open an in-memory extraction store (for tests).

clotho-store/src/data/extractions.rs.name: promote
clotho-store/src/data/extractions.rs.doc_comment: Promote a draft extraction. Returns the row so the caller can move it to entities.db.

clotho-store/src/data/extractions.rs.name: discard
clotho-store/src/data/extractions.rs.doc_comment: Discard a draft extraction (removes it from the store).

clotho-store/src/data/extractions.rs.name: list_by_confidence
clotho-store/src/data/extractions.rs.doc_comment: List draft extractions with confidence above a threshold.

clotho-store/src/data/jsonl.rs.name: TagEntry
clotho-store/src/data/jsonl.rs.doc_comment: A tag association: an entity has a tag.

clotho-store/src/data/jsonl.rs.name: add_tag
clotho-store/src/data/jsonl.rs.doc_comment: Add a tag to an entity. Appends a line to the JSONL file.

clotho-store/src/data/jsonl.rs.name: remove_tag
clotho-store/src/data/jsonl.rs.doc_comment: Remove a tag from an entity. Rewrites the file excluding the matching entry.

clotho-store/src/data/jsonl.rs.name: get_tags
clotho-store/src/data/jsonl.rs.doc_comment: Get all tags for an entity.

clotho-store/src/data/jsonl.rs.name: get_entities_by_tag
clotho-store/src/data/jsonl.rs.doc_comment: Get all entity IDs that have a specific tag.

clotho-store/src/data/jsonl.rs.name: EventType
clotho-store/src/data/jsonl.rs.signature: Created | Updated | Deleted | Promoted | Discarded | Transitioned | TagAdded | TagRemoved
clotho-store/src/data/jsonl.rs.doc_comment: Event types for the activity log.

clotho-store/src/data/jsonl.rs.name: Event
clotho-store/src/data/jsonl.rs.signature: { timestamp: DateTime<Utc>, event_type: EventType, entity_id: String, details: Option<serde_json::Value> }

clotho-store/src/data/jsonl.rs.name: log
clotho-store/src/data/jsonl.rs.doc_comment: Log an event. Appends a line to the JSONL file.

clotho-store/src/error.rs.name: StoreError
clotho-store/src/error.rs.signature: WorkspaceNotFound | WorkspaceAlreadyExists | InvalidWorkspace | Io | Sqlite | Json | TomlSerialize | TomlDeserialize | E...

clotho-store/src/federation.rs.name: Federation
clotho-store/src/federation.rs.signature: { entities_db: PathBuf, relations_db: PathBuf, search_db: PathBuf }
clotho-store/src/federation.rs.doc_comment:
Thin federation layer using SQLite ATTACH DATABASE (CLO-A-0002).

Enables cross-database queries spanning entities.db, relations.db,
and search.db from a single connection.

clotho-store/src/federation.rs.name: FederationRow
clotho-store/src/federation.rs.doc_comment: A row from a federation query, represented as a map of column names to values.

clotho-store/src/federation.rs.name: open
clotho-store/src/federation.rs.doc_comment: Create a federation handle for a workspace.

clotho-store/src/federation.rs.name: connect
clotho-store/src/federation.rs.doc_comment:
Create a connection with all databases attached.

- Main database: entities.db (as "ent")
- Attached: relations.db (as "graph"), search.db (as "idx")

clotho-store/src/federation.rs.name: query
clotho-store/src/federation.rs.doc_comment: Execute a cross-database SQL query and return results as rows of JSON values.

clotho-store/src/federation.rs.name: sqlite_to_json
clotho-store/src/federation.rs.doc_comment: Convert a rusqlite Value to a serde_json Value.

clotho-store/src/index.rs.name: SearchResult
clotho-store/src/index.rs.signature: { entity_id: String, entity_type: String, title: String, snippet: String, rank: f64 }
clotho-store/src/index.rs.doc_comment: A search result from the FTS5 index.

clotho-store/src/index.rs.name: SearchIndex
clotho-store/src/index.rs.doc_comment:
FTS5-backed keyword search index (index/search.db).

Fully derived — can be rebuilt from entities.db and content files at any time.

clotho-store/src/index.rs.name: open
clotho-store/src/index.rs.doc_comment: Open or create the search index at the given path.

clotho-store/src/index.rs.name: in_memory
clotho-store/src/index.rs.doc_comment: Open an in-memory search index (for tests).

clotho-store/src/index.rs.name: index_entity
clotho-store/src/index.rs.signature:
(
        &self,
        entity_id: &str,
        entity_type: &str,
        title: &str,
        content: &str,
    ) -> Result<(), StoreError>

clotho-store/src/index.rs.name: remove_entity
clotho-store/src/index.rs.doc_comment: Remove an entity from the search index.

clotho-store/src/index.rs.name: search
clotho-store/src/index.rs.doc_comment: Search by keyword using FTS5 MATCH with BM25 ranking.

clotho-store/src/index.rs.name: rebuild
clotho-store/src/index.rs.doc_comment: Drop and rebuild the entire index from entities.db and content files.

clotho-store/src/index.rs.name: connection
clotho-store/src/index.rs.doc_comment: Access the underlying connection (for federation ATTACH).

clotho-store/src/sync.rs.name: StoreSync
clotho-store/src/sync.rs.signature: { content: &'a ContentStore, entities: &'a EntityStore, extractions: &'a ExtractionStore, events: &'a EventStore, search...
clotho-store/src/sync.rs.doc_comment:
Coordinated write layer across all storage backends.

All mutations should go through StoreSync to ensure consistency
across content files, entities.db, graph, search index, and event log.

clotho-store/src/sync.rs.name: save_entity
clotho-store/src/sync.rs.signature:
(
        &self,
        row: &EntityRow,
        content: Option<&str>,
        entity_type: EntityType,
    ) -> Result<(), StoreError>
clotho-store/src/sync.rs.doc_comment:
Save an entity across all backends.

1. Write content to markdown file (if content provided)
2. Insert/update in entities.db
3. Register node in graph
4. Index in FTS5
5. Log event

clotho-store/src/sync.rs.name: delete_entity
clotho-store/src/sync.rs.doc_comment: Delete an entity from all backends.

clotho-store/src/sync.rs.name: promote_extraction
clotho-store/src/sync.rs.doc_comment:
Promote a draft extraction: move from extractions.db to entities.db,
register graph node, index in FTS5, and log event.

clotho-store/src/sync.rs.name: materialize_temporal_edges
clotho-store/src/sync.rs.signature:
(
        &self,
        id_str: &str,
        _entity_type: EntityType,
        has_cadence: bool,
        has_deadline: bool,
        has_schedule: bool,
    ) -> Result<(), StoreError>
clotho-store/src/sync.rs.doc_comment:
Materialize temporal edges for an entity in the graph.

Inspects the entity's temporal fields and creates/removes
corresponding HAS_CADENCE, HAS_DEADLINE, HAS_SCHEDULE graph edges.

clotho-store/src/sync.rs.name: log_event
clotho-store/src/sync.rs.signature:
(
        &self,
        event_type: EventType,
        entity_id: &str,
        details: Option<serde_json::Value>,
    ) -> Result<(), StoreError>

clotho-store/src/workspace.rs.name: WorkspaceConfig
clotho-store/src/workspace.rs.doc_comment: Default configuration for a Clotho workspace.

clotho-store/src/workspace.rs.name: SyncConfig
clotho-store/src/workspace.rs.signature: { auto_commit: bool, debounce_seconds: u64, shallow_history_limit: u32 }

clotho-store/src/workspace.rs.name: Workspace
clotho-store/src/workspace.rs.doc_comment: A Clotho workspace rooted at a `.workspace/` directory.

clotho-store/src/workspace.rs.name: init
clotho-store/src/workspace.rs.doc_comment:
Initialize a new workspace at the given path.

Creates the full directory tree and default config files.
The path should be where `.workspace/` will be created
(e.g., passing `/home/user/work` creates `/home/user/work/.workspace/`).

clotho-store/src/workspace.rs.name: open
clotho-store/src/workspace.rs.doc_comment:
Open an existing workspace.

Validates that the directory structure is intact.

clotho-sync/src/engine.rs.name: SyncResult
clotho-sync/src/engine.rs.signature: { committed: bool, pushed: bool, files_changed: usize }

clotho-sync/src/engine.rs.name: SyncEngine
clotho-sync/src/engine.rs.doc_comment:
Git-based sync engine for Clotho workspaces.

Uses git as a dumb sync layer — not version control.
Auto-commits with timestamp messages, pushes silently.

clotho-sync/src/engine.rs.name: init
clotho-sync/src/engine.rs.doc_comment:
Initialize a git repository for a Clotho workspace.

The git repo is created at the workspace's parent directory
(i.e., the directory containing `.workspace/`).
Writes a .gitignore to exclude `index/`.

clotho-sync/src/engine.rs.name: open
clotho-sync/src/engine.rs.doc_comment: Open an existing git repository for a Clotho workspace.

clotho-sync/src/engine.rs.name: has_remote
clotho-sync/src/engine.rs.doc_comment: Check whether the repository has a remote named "origin".

clotho-sync/src/engine.rs.name: sync
clotho-sync/src/engine.rs.doc_comment:
Sync the workspace: stage all changes, commit, and push (if remote).

Flow: add all → check for changes → commit → pull-rebase → push

clotho-sync/src/engine.rs.name: push
clotho-sync/src/engine.rs.doc_comment: Push to origin/main. Returns true if push succeeded.

clotho-sync/src/engine.rs.name: prune_history
clotho-sync/src/engine.rs.doc_comment:
Prune history to keep only the most recent `keep` commits.

Squashes all older commits into a single orphan root commit,
preserving the current HEAD tree state.

clotho-sync/src/engine.rs.name: commit_count
clotho-sync/src/engine.rs.doc_comment: Count the number of commits in the repository.

clotho-sync/tests/sync_tests.rs.name: setup_workspace
clotho-sync/tests/sync_tests.rs.doc_comment: Helper: create a .workspace/ directory structure in a temp dir.

clotho-tests/tests/e2e_workflows.rs.name: TestWorkspace
clotho-tests/tests/e2e_workflows.rs.doc_comment: Helper: init workspace + all stores, returns everything needed.

clotho-tests/tests/e2e_workflows.rs.name: TestWorkspace
clotho-tests/tests/e2e_workflows.rs.doc_comment:
